facts.quizQuestion: What does "両方" (りょうほう) mean?
facts.explanation: 両方 (りょうほう) — both. Part of speech: noun, adjective. Also: both sides, both parties

facts.quizQuestion: What does "力" (ちから) mean?
facts.explanation: 力 (ちから) — force. Part of speech: noun. Also: strength, might, vigour, vigor, energy, capability, ability, proficiency, capacity, faculty, efficacy, effect, effort, endeavours, endeavors, exertions, power, authority, influence, good offices, agency, support, help, aid, assistance, stress, emphasis, means, resources

facts.quizQuestion: What does "林" (はやし) mean?
facts.explanation: 林 (はやし) — wood. Part of speech: noun. Also: woods, forest, grove, copse, thicket, bunch (of something), cluster, line, collection

facts.quizQuestion: What does "例えば" (たとえば) mean?
facts.explanation: 例えば (たとえば) — for example. Part of speech: adverb. Also: for instance, e.g.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "冷える" (ひえる) mean?
facts.explanation: 冷える (ひえる) — to grow cold. Part of speech: verb. Also: to get chilly, to cool down

facts.quizQuestion: What does "冷房" (れいぼう) mean?
facts.explanation: 冷房 (れいぼう) — air conditioning. Part of speech: noun, verb. Also: air cooling

facts.quizQuestion: What does "歴史" (れきし) mean?
facts.explanation: 歴史 (れきし) — history. Part of speech: noun.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "連れる" (つれる) mean?
facts.explanation: 連れる (つれる) — to take (someone) with one. Part of speech: verb. Also: to bring along, to go with, to be accompanied by

facts.quizQuestion: What does "連絡" (れんらく) mean?
facts.explanation: 連絡 (れんらく) — contacting. Part of speech: noun, verb. Also: (making) contact, getting in touch, communication, correspondence, call, message, connection (with a train, bus, etc.), joining (a railway line, etc.), meeting, connection (between matters, incidents, etc.), relation, link

facts.quizQuestion: What does "腕" (うで) mean?
facts.explanation: 腕 (うで) — arm. Part of speech: noun. Also: ability, skill, talent, competence, (physical) strength

facts.quizQuestion: What does "屹度" (きっと) mean?
facts.explanation: 屹度 (きっと) — surely. Part of speech: adverb. Also: undoubtedly, almost certainly, most likely (e.g. 90 percent), sternly, severely, having no slack, rigid, stiff, tight, suddenly, abruptly, instantly

facts.quizQuestion: What does "掏摸" (すり) mean?
facts.explanation: 掏摸 (すり) — pickpocket. Part of speech: noun.
